GameTankEmulator core sources vendored from:
  repo:   https://github.com/clydeshaffer/GameTankEmulator
  commit: e7e25e2daf5da5d041ae8dc48f740a362c1e66ff
  date:   2026-06-03 22:17:17 -0400
  license: MIT (Copyright 2020 Clyde Shaffer)

Vendored (reusable hardware emulation units only):
  mos6502/  blitter  audio_coprocessor  palette  timekeeper
  system_state  emulator_config  game_config  gametank_palette

NOT vendored (standalone-app shell the libretro core replaces):
  gte.cpp (SDL window + main loop), imgui/, devtools/, tinyfd/,
  whereami/, ui/, font.cpp, joystick_*  -- see src/libretro.cpp instead
